plugins.name: anthara
plugins.description: AI adoption platform for regulated industries. End-to-end SDLC chain — start, brainstorm, discovery, spec-writer, create-ticket, develop, collaboration-loop — with compliance packs (HIPAA / PCI / SOC 2 / FDA SaMD / WCAG / OWASP / Clean Code) injected by context via Fabric MCP's get_relevant_standards. /anthara:start triages the work and routes to the right entry. /anthara:brainstorm generates and evaluates options for open-ended problems before discovery begins. /anthara:develop is a slice-by-slice TDD orchestrator that bakes design-check and per-pack reviewer fleet into the build loop (quality at construction, not correction). /anthara:inbox is a role-tuned, channel-agnostic work aggregator that pulls every connected MCP channel (Jira / GitHub / Slack / Linear / Notion / Gmail / Teams) and ranks the day's work in one flat table.
